title: 1x Wooden Boot Scraper Brush - 23cm - Outdoor Garden Stiff Bristle Shoe Welly Football Boots Cleaning Cleaner Mud Remover - By Ashley
features: This boot scrubber brush is ideal for keeping dirt, grass, snow & mud where it belongs, outside.
Manufactured from a hardwood & rust-resistant steel construction with heavy duty bristles, it is durable, flexible, portable & easy to use; ideal for keeping your footwear & house clean.

It is suitable for use in the home, farm, factory etc & is ideal for cleaning hiking boots, walking shoes, athletic shoes & more. It can also be permanently secured using screws if desired as there are 4 mounting holes located on the scrubber bottom bracket (screws not supplied).
Approx Size: L23 x W15 x H11.5cm
